vibe: Professional, premium, energetic, high-contrast command center (cockpit feel for managers, ultra-legible outdoor tool for reps)

buttons.primary: Background primary, radius 8px, height 56px, centered flex, bold text, shadow.
buttons.secondary: Background secondary, radius 8px, height 56px, centered flex, bold text.
buttons.outline: Border 2px primary, transparent bg, radius 8px, height 56px, centered flex, primary text bold.
buttons.start_stop_work: Massive 80px circular or full-width button. Start mode is Cobalt (#0055FF), Stop mode is Red (#EF4444). Prominent drop shadow.

kpi_tile.wrapper: Background inverted (#09090B), radius 12px, padding 16px, flex column, border border-dark.
kpi_tile.value_text: Text inverse, 32px, black weight, tight tracking.

progress_bar.track: Height 12px, background zinc-200, rounded full, full width.
progress_bar.layout: Row: Avatar (40x40) -> Text Stack (flex-1) -> Percentage text -> Progress bar underneath.

map_pin.default: Dark inverted pill with white text and orange dot indicator. Sharp, minimal.
map_pin.cluster: Circular badge (#0055FF) with white count text and subtle drop shadow.

form_input.label: Text 14px, bold, primary-text.
form_input.input: Height 56px, border zinc-300, radius 8px, padding 16px, background white. On focus: border primary 2px.

lead_card.wrapper: Background white, padding 16px, radius 12px, shadow small, border zinc-100, flex column gap 8px.
lead_card.header: Flex row, justify space-between, items start.
lead_card.status_badge: Padding horizontal 8px, padding vertical 4px, radius 4px, text 12px, bold, uppercase.

offer_builder_step.totals_footer: Background white, padding 16px, border top zinc-200, positioned at bottom/sticky.
offer_builder_step.pdf_button: Full width, background primary, height 56px, radius 8px, text white, bold, 18px.

Login.layout: Centered logo, full height form taking up bottom half of screen. Solid background with minimal aesthetic.

Manager_Dashboard.vibe: Command Center / Cockpit. Dense but highly scannable.
Manager_Dashboard.header: Dark inverted header with greeting and date.
Manager_Dashboard.layout: Top row: 2x2 grid of KPI tiles (dark). Section 2: Cele i postęp (white cards). Section 3: Statusy leadów (donut chart). Section 4: Map (height 300px, embedded). Section 5: Top 3 Handlowców ranking (list layout).

Handlowiec_Home.vibe: Action-oriented, clear outdoors, extremely high contrast.
Handlowiec_Home.layout: Header: Massive Start/Stop Work toggle. Main CTA: Huge 'Dodaj leada' primary button. Secondary: 'Generator ofert OZE' button. Bottom section: 'Moje wyniki' summary card.

Add_Lead.layout: Scrollable form. Top: Camera trigger (big dashed box or button). Middle: Client details, auto-geotag read-only field. Bottom: Sticky save button.

Offer_Generator.layout: Multi-step wizard. Step indicator at top. Inputs for building parameters, slider/inputs for margin/discount. Bottom sticky footer with live 'Rata miesięczna' and 'Generuj PDF' button.

Admin_Settings.layout: List layout. Sections for Tariffs, RRSO rates, Postal Codes. Standard iOS/Android settings list items.

icons.family: Feather or Ionicons (clean, stroke-based. Do not mix families arbitrarily).

motion.screen_transition: Standard React Navigation slide from right.
motion.button_press: Scale down to 0.95, opacity 0.8 on active opacity.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure all text on primary/secondary buttons is white. Test in sunlight.
accessibility.touch_targets: Minimum 48x48px, preferred 56x56px for all tappable elements.

instructions_to_main_agent: Use @expo-google-fonts for Outfit (Headings) and Manrope (Body) if integrating custom fonts.
Ensure all interactive elements have testID attributes in kebab-case (e.g., data-testid='login-button' or testID='login-button').
For the Manager Dashboard KPI tiles, strictly use the inverted dark color scheme (#09090B) to differentiate it as the 'Command Center'.
Offer Generator must have a fixed/sticky bottom container for the live totals to ensure they are always visible while scrolling through form inputs.
Use react-native-maps for the Lead Map with clustered markers if possible (using a wrapper library like react-native-map-clustering).
DO NOT use raw HTML components, this is React Native. Map the provided styling to StyleSheet or NativeWind classes as requested in your implementation.
